Mission & Vision of Leading Eye Care Hospital in Kochi

Giridhar Eye Institute (GEI), located at Kadavanthara, Cochin, is an NABH accredited Eye Hospital offering a wide range of comprehensive eye care services. Since its establishment on 8th September 1997, GEI has become a centre of excellence. In addition, the institute is strongly committed to values and ethical conduct. Furthermore, patient satisfaction is the primary goal of the institution, which is achieved through a philosophy of personalized care at an affordable cost.

Explore Our Journey

Discover the rich history and milestones of Giridhar Eye Institute, reflecting our commitment to exceptional eye care.

View History

Vision

Affordable Quality Eye Care for All.

Mission

Establish an eye care centre with all sub-specialties in Ophthalmology. Provide clinical expertise comparable to the best in the world. Establish it as a centre where clinical practice is combined with teaching and research.

Quality Policy

We are totally committed to take care of patients’ requirements by offering expert ophthalmic care with a team of trained, committed and dedicated professionals and continually improve the quality of our services to ensure excellent medical care and patient satisfaction.
